text.div: A laboratory task has been requested for Juan Dela Cruz by Dr. Maria Clara Santos. The task involves collecting a blood sample for routine CBC testing. The task status is requested with routine priority, scheduled for execution between 09:00 and 10:00 on March 15, 2024. The Department of Health - Central Office is the assigned owner for this task. Additional note: Patient has confirmed appointment. Please ensure fasting status is verified before sample collection.

coding.display: Collection of blood specimen for laboratory

description: Collect blood sample for complete blood count (CBC) testing

note.text: Patient has confirmed appointment. Please ensure fasting status is verified before sample collection.
